calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jul-17-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Christopher R. Carling, Esq. of Chapman & Intrerie, LLP, (510-864-3600), for HSM SF Inc., Defendant and moving party.
No appearance by Plaintiff in pro per.

Defendant's counsel notifies the Court that Plaintiff in pro per was notified re contest of the tentative ruling. Arguments are heard by Court. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT HSM SF INC.'s Motion For Attorneys Fees is DENIED. CC&Rs attorney's fees clause and CC 5975 are not applicable to the case at bar based on allegations of unlawful lockout that occurred on April 23, 2013. No evidence or authority cited for the proposition that the allegations in the complaint are "inextricably intertwined with" and "in retaliation to" Defendants action to enforce the CC&Rs November 2011. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge John K. Stewart, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Attorneys Fees
Off Calendar Jun-25-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment; Points And Authorities, And Declarations - Insistence

Off Calendar Jun-05-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Dianne Talley-Evans, Plaintiff in pro per and moving party, (415-946-9664).
Gary M. Evans, Plaintiff in pro per and moving party, (415-347-7818).
Josh Johnson, Esq. of Chapman & Intrieri, (510-864-3600), for HSM, Defendant and opposing party.

Court raises issues on plaintiffs' credibilities, Plaintiffs using two addresses, San Francisco and San Leandro. Plaintiffs briefly argued re issues raised by Court.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFFS DIANE TALLEY-EVANS and GARY EVANS' Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment is DENIED. Moving party fails to sustain burden under CCP 473(b). There is no specific evidence regarding lack of notice of March 25, 2015 hearing or August 15, 2014 order. Proofs of service indicate that plaintiffs were served at their address on the record. Plaintiffs fail to attach a proposed opposition to the motion to dismiss. Order is signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
